response: {"gender":"Male","age":"32","decision_strategy":"For the ones that were given a monetary value prior, I tried to remember as many of those as possible. For the ones that I wasn't told were worth more or less money, I just usually just went with what was the more pleasant of the two activities, instead of what cost the most money.","consistency_check":"I tried to stick with which activity was the most pleasant, and I attributed it to costing more money for being an overall better experience, and therefore a better use of money. It's nebulous logic, but that's how I was determining which option to choose."}
